name: Publicly Readable Alibaba Buckets
query: { buckets( where: { cloudProvider: { eq: "alibaba" } publicAccessBlocked: { eq: false } OR: [ { acl_IN: ["public-read"] } { bucketPolicy: { statements_SOME: { effect: { eq: "Allow" } OR: [ { actions_INCLUDES: "oss:GetObject" } { actions_INCLUDES: "oss:ListObjects" } { actions_INCLUDES: "oss:GetObjectVersion" } { actions_INCLUDES: "oss:*" } { actions_INCLUDES: "*" } ] principals_INCLUDES: "*" } } } ] } ) {...AssetFragment} }
